backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for psychometric test bookings, counseling session bookings, user profiles, and contact inquiries, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to replace the native CounselingBookingForm with a Tally embedded form (ID EkX2OB) on CounselingPage.tsx, reusing or updating the TallyFormEmbed component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, page, hook, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the document title to 'The Smart Choice' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Home, Psychometric Test, Counseling, and Contact pages, all wrapped in the SiteLayout component.
frontend/src/components/forms/ContactInq: Empty file placeholder for the contact inquiry form component.
frontend/src/components/forms/Counseling: Counseling session booking form with fields for student/parent details, session mode, date/time preferences, and backend integration via a React Query mutation with validation and success/error state handling.
frontend/src/components/forms/Psychometr: Psychometric test booking form with student detail fields, a pricing callout banner showing an intro offer of Rs. 749 (MRP Rs. 1249), and backend submission via React Query mutation with validation.
frontend/src/components/forms/Submission: A reusable React component that renders one of three UI states—loading spinner, success confirmation, or error message—based on the `type` prop, with optional title, message, and reset callback.
frontend/src/components/forms/TallyFormE: Embeds a Tally.so form via an iframe, dynamically injecting the Tally embed script if not already present and triggering `loadEmbeds` on mount.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Main site layout component providing a sticky header with desktop/mobile navigation, a footer with quick links, and a floating WhatsApp button, wrapping page content as children.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Fixed floating action button that links to WhatsApp Click-to-Chat for phone number 919811575100 with a prefilled message, styled with WhatsApp green and hover/scale effects.
frontend/src/constants/brand.ts: Exports two brand name string constants: `BRAND_NAME` ('The Smart Choice') and `BRAND_NAME_LOWERCASE` ('thesmartchoice').
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitCo: Empty file; intended to house a React Query mutation hook for submitting contact inquiries but contains no implementation.
React Query mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitCounselingSessionBooking` method with session details and invalidates the counseling bookings query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/mutations/useSubmitPs: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitPsychometricTestBooking` method with booking details and invalidates the psychometric test bookings query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using an authenticated identity when available and initializing admin access control from a URL secret parameter.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrappers around the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact page with a hero section, three contact info cards (email, phone, visit), and an embedded Tally form for sending messages. Includes a smooth-scroll button to jump to the form.
frontend/src/pages/CounselingPage.tsx: Renders the 1:1 Counseling page with a hero section, a grid of session details (personal attention, scheduling, online/in-person, 60-minute sessions), and an embedded Tally booking form.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page with a hero section (CTA buttons for psychometric test and counseling), a services grid linking to Contact, Psychometric Test, and Counseling pages, and additional informational sections.
Renders the Psychometric Test page with a hero section showing an introductory pricing offer (Rs. 749), an explanation of psychometric testing, feature highlights, and a booking form component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, custom color tokens using oklch CSS variables, typography/container-query/animate plugins, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features, pending feature requests, architectural notes, and known issues; currently records a pending task to replace the native counseling booking form with a Tally embedded form.
